response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the event as 'Drawn to Dawn' concert from on-screen branding and logos.
2. Recognized the song being performed as 'KING' by Kanaria.
3. Conducted web searches to confirm the song and get accurate Japanese and translated lyrics.
4. Resolved metadata: Song Title 'KING', Original Artist 'Kanaria', Performers 'Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina'nis', Original Language 'Japanese'.
5. Formatted the output into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: This video features a live concert performance of the song 'KING' by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis during their first joint concert, 'Drawn to Dawn'. The stage is darkened, and the audience uses glow sticks throughout the performance.

scenes.description: A live performance of the song 'KING' by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis at the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. The audience is visible in the foreground, waving glow sticks in sync with the song. The performers are not directly visible on stage, but their voices and the concert's branding are prominent.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
locking up the clever one before they die
you, hey, you know that it's a pain to get you to be obedient, darling
don't lock me up! it's not like i knew
give me a break! you're so cruel
the wishes of the people feel like scraps of irony
everyone's wishing for the same thing: it's a mechanical
virgin happy show you want to get in on before everyone else,
where nobody knows what's going to happen next
i don't have a single brand-new wish:
it's the same as ever, and on top of that, there's no
warning, warning
i put all my stress
into a wish for you
left side, right side
baring your fangs, pa-pa-pa, this is so embarrassing
left side, right side
let your fangs poke out, pa-pa-pa
playing innocently
you're the darling, darling that i've been wishing and hoping for
when you laugh admirably, all of my pain disappears
and i'm able to die clumsily, my bitter feelings fading too
lo-lo-love, ra-ta-ta
i hate it, i hate it, it's the worst – i burst into tears and i'm down for the count
just as always, here's a brand-new wish:
the same as ever, there's no picked-out
warning, warning
i put all my stress
into a wish for you
left side, right side
baring your fangs, pa-pa-pa, this is so bothersome
